name: trogondb
description: A key-value database with compatibility for the Redis protocol.

name: floppix
description: A lightweight, portable, asynchronous web server inspired by Apache and Nginx.

description: A source code preprocessing system that introduces C++-style template syntax to the C programming language.

name: spr
description: A library providing a cross-platform C/C++ API for platform-specific functionality, such as work with files and threads.

name: fpp
description: A simple program for file encryption using OpenSSL.

name: easypg
description: A tool for generating cryptographically secure pseudorandom passwords.
